'''shazhate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:wobblingly|wobblingly]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-zh-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wobblingly|wobblingly]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| shazhate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:shazhate|shazhate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:shazhatesher|shazhatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazhatesherĂ«m|shazhatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:shazhatero|shazhatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shazhateshĂ«|shazhateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazhateshĂ«m|shazhateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokishazhatero|gokishazhatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishazhateshĂ«|gokishazhateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazhateshĂ«m|gokishazhateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goshazhankerom|goshazhankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshazhankeshĂ«|goshazhankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazhankeshĂ«m|goshazhankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goshazhankeya|goshazhankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:shazhaterom|shazhaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazhatemu|shazhatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:shazhateya|shazhateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokishazhaterom|gokishazhaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazhatemu|gokishazhatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokishazhateya|gokishazhateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:shazhazhate|shazhazhate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:shazhazhatesher|shazhazhatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazhazhatesherĂ«m|shazhazhatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:shazhazhatero|shazhazhatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shazhazhateshĂ«|shazhazhateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazhazhateshĂ«m|shazhazhateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokishazhazhatero|gokishazhazhatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishazhazhateshĂ«|gokishazhazhateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazhazhateshĂ«m|gokishazhazhateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goshazhazhankerom|goshazhazhankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshazhazhankeshĂ«|goshazhazhankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazhazhankeshĂ«m|goshazhazhankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goshazhazhankeya|goshazhazhankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:shazhazhaterom|shazhazhaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazhazhatemu|shazhazhatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:shazhazhateya|shazhazhateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokishazhazhaterom|gokishazhazhaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazhazhatemu|gokishazhazhatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokishazhazhateya|gokishazhazhateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:shĂŠzhĂŠte|shĂŠzhĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:shĂŠzhĂŠtesher|shĂŠzhĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shĂŠzhĂŠtesherĂ«m|shĂŠzhĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:shĂŠzhĂŠtero|shĂŠzhĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«|shĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«m|shĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokishĂŠzhĂŠtero|gokishĂŠzhĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«|gokishĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«m|gokishĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goshĂŠzhĂŠnkerom|goshĂŠzhĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshĂŠzhĂŠnkeshĂ«|goshĂŠzhĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshĂŠzhĂŠnkeshĂ«m|goshĂŠzhĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goshĂŠzhĂŠnkeya|goshĂŠzhĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:shĂŠzhĂŠterom|shĂŠzhĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shĂŠzhĂŠtemu|shĂŠzhĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:shĂŠzhĂŠteya|shĂŠzhĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokishĂŠzhĂŠterom|gokishĂŠzhĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishĂŠzhĂŠtemu|gokishĂŠzhĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokishĂŠzhĂŠteya|gokishĂŠzhĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:shafzhafte|shafzhafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:shafzhaftesher|shafzhaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafzhaftesherĂ«m|shafzhaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:shafzhaftero|shafzhaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shafzhafteshĂ«|shafzhafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafzhafteshĂ«m|shafzhafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokishafzhaftero|gokishafzhaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishafzhafteshĂ«|gokishafzhafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafzhafteshĂ«m|gokishafzhafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goshafzhafnkerom|goshafzhafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshafzhafnkeshĂ«|goshafzhafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafzhafnkeshĂ«m|goshafzhafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goshafzhafnkeya|goshafzhafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:shafzhafterom|shafzhafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafzhaftemu|shafzhaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:shafzhafteya|shafzhafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokishafzhafterom|gokishafzhafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafzhaftemu|gokishafzhaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokishafzhafteya|gokishafzhafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
